rationale: Educ. Code §44.151 governs school district litigation over defective facilities and disposition of net proceeds. It has no operative connection to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 44.151. ACTIONS BROUGHT FOR DEFECTIVE DESIGN, CONSTRUCTION, RENOVATION, OR IMPROVEMENT OF SCHOOL DISTRICT FACILITY.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns facility defect litigation and state share recovery, not property tax homestead exemptions.
